# remove(notification:)

**Instance Method**

Removes a previously posted notification from your accessory.

## Declaration

```swift
func remove(notification: AccessoryNotification)
```

## Parameters

- **notification**: A notification to remove from the accessory’s display.

## Removing notifications

- **removeAllNotifications()**: Removes all notifications from the user interface.

items.description: Removes all notifications from the user interface.
items.name: removeAllNotifications()
